programmes.show_name: William & The King: Like Father, Like Son
programmes.show_description: A powerful exploration of the evolving bond between King Charles and Prince William, a father and son united not just by family, but by the future of the monarchy itself.
The team deal with an injured man under the influence of drugs, a one-year-old baby in the grip of life-threatening seizures, and a fire in a garage containing hazardous chemicals.

programmes.show_name: Peeping Tom: The Landlord & His Secret Cameras
programmes.show_description: This documentary tells the story of a powerful man who, for over 15 years, secretly filmed for his own pleasure, dozens of women bathing, undressing and having sex.
In 2013, teen Jayden Parkinson went missing. Detectives suspect her murder and have questions for her ex-boyfriend. Has Jayden been killed and, if so, where is her body?

Surrey Police are caught by surprise when a learner motorcyclist pulls a dangerous wheelie on the road in front of him. A couple moving house give traffic officers cause for concern. (Ep6)
Hayley and her cleaning team Tom and Chesley go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from South Devon whose house hasn't had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.
Is Leah saying goodbye forever? Levi and Mackenzie stick their noses in. Tane and Jo need some time alone.
At one of London's most exclusive stores a suspected theft could come in at over the £200 threshold for police involvement. Plus, how AI is changing the theft prevention game. (Ep13)
Nush receives intel about two men acting suspiciously. Guards Kasey and Vaz are despatched to keep eyes on. As the duo leave the shop, they set off the alarm - the chase is on! (Ep14)
In West Orchards, Coventry, there's a stand-off between guards and a gang in a premium store. In London, CCTV is needed when a woman is suspected of being on the pinch. (Ep15)
The traffic cops of north Yorkshire are back, and in this episode drug drivers are responsible for a number of highly dangerous incidents. Hosted by Jamie Theakston.
Fifteen miles south of York, a prolific car thief crashes and rolls a stolen car at over 100mph. In Harrogate, the hunt for a disqualified driver leads to a high-speed pursuit.
Near York, a young driver in a stolen car is on a suspected high behind the wheel. The police must make a move before the reckless man can join a busy motorway and cause more mayhem.
Drink-driving, drug use and atrocious weather all contribute to cases for the Traffic Cops, including one coke-snorting driver who gets arrested twice in quick succession.
Observational documentary series. The high-speed pursuit specialists of Cumbria tackle a runaway knifeman, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.
Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.
Cumbria's interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspected gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm.
A serial offender gives the Cumbrian officers the runaround and a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish.
A speeding car knocks down an 81-year-old cyclist at a crossing. With news that the victim has died, an investigation turns into a hunt for the deceased's killer.

programmes.show_name: The Push: Death on a Cruise Ship
programmes.show_description: During a cruise with her ex-husband, Micki Kanesaki disappeared. This documentary lifts the lid on an extraordinary case involving FBI, private investigators, phone tapping and death threats.
In 2002, Philip Walsted, a gay man, is attacked in Tucson by David Higdon. Struck with a bat over 50 times, he dies from hate-fuelled violence committed by a neo-Nazi extremist.
Mother of three Natalie Hemming split up from her partner, believing it would be amicable. But when she disappeared soon after, attention turned to her jilted partner Paul.
Dr Toby is spellbound by his patient, Gideon, Preston's part-time witch, and Dr Natalia Spierings tries to help a young woman with a scalp condition usually found in middle-aged men.
This episode looks at the dangerous obsession with surgery that often goes hand in hand with a rise to fame.
Challengers 'Towel Compoulder' try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep7)
In the quiz show, hosted by Jeremy Vine, challengers 'Shuttle Watchers' try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep8)

John bids farewell to market trading with help from son Marco. Wendy & Julia host a Halloween fundraiser for animals, while wedding planner Louise faces a crisp-filled challenge.
Leonora and Ben's bar hosts a line dancing event while dodging falling palm tree debris. Jessie conquers her fear of heights, and Tracey tests her new sausage venture in sunny Spain.
In a sports store, a woman protests that she's paid for all her items, but her receipts tell a different story. Plus undercover detective Steve monitors pick pocketing in China Town. (Ep16)
Action-packed highlights from the documentary series following Yorkshire-based law enforcers. Can the cops stop a nighttime riot from breaking out in Bradford?
In Bradford there's a high-octane chase through a housing estate, and Yorkshire's back roads have their peace disturbed by two cars carrying gun-toting drug dealers.
A driver nearly causes carnage to make sure his takeaway stays hot, a large cannabis stash is found at the scene of a crash, and a drunk driver gets caught short.
Dog handler Jon is forced to wrestle with a drunken man, Dan has an early-morning meeting with a drink-driver and a wine-loving shoplifter gets his just desserts.
A violent man wreaks havoc in a hospital and the driver of a stolen VW Beetle rewrites the highway code.
Documentary series. A routine check on a car uncovers suspected drug dealing, a runaway cow causes problems and a wanted petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a halt.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
Is Leah saying goodbye forever? Levi and Mackenzie stick their noses in. Tane and Jo need some time alone.
Cash's lie catches up to him. Is Leah walking out on her marriage? Remi's symptoms multiply.
Documentary series. Dr Watson offers 'talking therapy' to a young lady who recently lost her mother and Dr Bower treats a gentleman who is plagued by suicidal thoughts.
We return to Barnsley Casualty where Owen, 4, has a seizure and is immediately taken to resus. Sister Jane deals with a broken chute used to transport bloods.
High-octane medical emergencies include a man found collapsed in a hotel room, a head-on collision between two motorcyclists, and an 11-year-old who's taken a tumble from his scooter.
The team at Hull Royal Infirmary has another busy night: a man is involved in a motorbike collision with a deer and a young patient is in agony with his ankle facing the wrong way.
